title: shiprig release config
description: Release-pipeline configuration for shiprig (release.jsonc / shiprig.json); all keys optional, defaults run the built-in steps.

tool.description: Base command used to invoke changesets for the built-in version/publish steps (default "changeset").

shell.description: How shell-string commands run: "portable" (default in-process shell) or "system" (the OS shell).

order.description: Ordered list of step names to run; nil uses the default order.

steps.description: Per-step configuration, keyed by step name.

hooks.description: Global hooks that bracket the entire release run.

before.description: Commands run once before any step.

after.description: Commands run once after all steps succeed.

onError.description: Commands run when any step fails.

vars.description: Named variables captured/computed and injected into step args via ${vars.name}.

changeset.description: Nested changeset config when one file carries both (pipeline at top level, changeset config here).

commandList.description: A single command (shell string or argv array) or a list of them.

step.description: Configures a single step in the pipeline.

enabled.description: Whether the step runs; absent means default (enabled).

name.description: Human display label shown in plans and progress output.

before.description: Commands run before the step's action.

after.description: Commands run after the step's action.

run.description: The step's action (overrides a built-in's default; the action for a custom step).

script.description: The step's action as Tengo code: a string, an array of lines, or { "file": "path.tengo" }.

if.description: Tengo expression gating the step; falsy skips it.

dryRun.description: Controls the action during --dry-run: true executes, false hides, a command/list runs an alternate.

ecosystems.description: Restricts the step to releases including a package in one of these ecosystems.

args.description: Extra arguments appended to a built-in command.

message.description: Commit message template, for the built-in commit step.

confirm.description: Confirmation gate: true (default prompt), a custom prompt string, or false (no gate).

forgeURL.description: Self-hosted forge base URL for an explicit gitlab/gitea.

varSpec.description: A variable: a bare string literal, or an object setting exactly one of value/command/script.

command.description: A command whose trimmed stdout becomes the value (masked).

script.description: A Tengo expression evaluated against the script ctx.

lazy.description: Defer capture until first reference (keeps a time-limited secret fresh).
